items: The file viewer now marks uncommitted changes in the gutter, so you can see at a glance which lines you've added or edited.
Repositories with a GitHub remote now have a "View on GitHub" option in the sidebar folder menu to open the repo in your browser.
You can now point ReCue at a custom coding-agent command in Settings, for agents beyond the built-in choices.
A new "Show session usage" setting lets you hide the five-hour usage bar — and stop the app from reading your login token — if you'd rather not display it.
Settings now includes a keyboard shortcuts reference so you can look up every shortcut in one place.
Clearing your recent folders now asks for confirmation first, so you can't wipe the list by accident.
The five-hour usage bar no longer reads a stale or expired login token, so it reports your usage more reliably.
The "New session" button label now truncates neatly instead of overflowing when it's long.
Removed a redundant "+" add-card button from the Kanban column headers to tidy up the board.
Kanban cards no longer keep a stray highlight border after you drag them.
